texto: Martha Ridgley had been a single, working-class woman with no children or close family. Her killer had never been caught, and her case was eventually forgotten.But not by everyone—not by whoever had been paying the rent on Apartment #37 for over two decades until, for one reason or another, the lease was finally up.The Woman in Apartment #37byJohn MeadfromBook of the Dead
explicacao: Citação de John Mead sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Martha Ridgley had been a single, working-class woman with no children or close family.
